expectations.evidence: Output includes CWV-01 to CWV-03 for LCP, CWV-04 to CWV-06 for INP, CWV-07 to CWV-11 for CLS in a structured table. Summary section explicitly states LCP Impact, INP Impact, and CLS Impact.
All 11 CWV items (CWV-01 through CWV-11) are listed in a table with code, metric, item name, result, and findings. Confirms 'All 11 CWV items have been evaluated.'
Each item marked N/A with specific reasoning. Summary provides per-metric impact statements. Concludes all items N/A because changed files are Markdown skill configuration files.

eval_feedback.overall: The with_skill run produced a thorough, structured CWV analysis with all 11 checklist items, bilingual scope assessment, and clear per-metric impact summary.
